steps.description: Click the "Open in Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" menu option under the "Develop" section of the sidebar in the Developer Portal interface.
Click the "Open in Visual Studio Code (JS/TS)" button in the Microsoft Teams Developer Portal interface within the "Develop" section to initiate app development using Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Open Visual Studio Code - URL Handler" button in the application permissions dialog to confirm launching Visual Studio Code from the browser.
Click on the "Continue without Signing In" button located in the bottom-right corner of the VS Code welcome screen.
Click the "Open" button in the confirmation dialog titled "Allow 'Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit' extension to open this URI?" located in the Visual Studio Code interface.
Click the "Use weaker encryption" button within the notification dialog that warns about OS keyring issues and provides alternatives for encryption handling.
Click the "Sign in" button in the Microsoft 365 login dialog box to proceed with authentication.
Click on the "Password" text box within the Microsoft login page to set focus for entering the password.
Type text: '${{secret:M365_ACCOUNT_PASSWORD}}' into the password input field located on the Microsoft sign-in page under the label "Enter password."
Press the "Enter" key to attempt signing in by interacting with the "Sign in" button on the Microsoft login page.
@assertion 'You are signed in now and can close this page' is exist
Click the "Close (X)" button in the top-right corner of the browser window to close the page after signing in.
